Testing obfuscation and optimization:

call_opaque_predicate: 20
call_instruction_substitution: 225
call_string_encryption: 127
call_tail_call_optimized: 500500
call_non_tail_call: 5050
call_vectorized_loop: 72

param_null_pointer_deref:

call_buffer_overflow: 30
call_integer_overflow: 2000000000
